description: Dynamic bridge between scheduled runs. Each run reads this file, applies its learnings, does its work, then OVERWRITES this file with updated context for the next run. This is the memory of the intelligence system.

market_regime.label: WAR_PREMIUM_RESURGING
market_regime.key_risk: Iran REJECTED 45-day ceasefire. Trump new Tuesday 8pm ET Hormuz deadline. Escalation imminent if no deal.
market_regime.regime_note: REGIME REVERTED: Apr 6 de-escalation narrative was a FALSE DAWN. Iran formally rejected 45-day ceasefire (demanding permanent peace). Trump issued new Tuesday 8pm ET deadline for Hormuz reopening or massive strikes. Only 5% of pre-war shipping through Hormuz. Brent back at $110.05 (above $110 threshold). FII sold ₹8,167 Cr on Apr 6 (PAT001 threshold breached). Nifty opened at 22,838 on Apr 7, pulling back from Apr 6 close. Key binary: Tuesday 8pm ET deadline → if strikes → Nifty gap-down to 22,200-22,500. If Iran blinks → brief relief rally. P003 (Nifty bearish) thesis STRONGLY REVIVING (conf: 1→3). P002 (MRPL bearish) REVIVING (conf: 1→2). P005 (Coal India bullish) UNCHANGED (conf: 5).

open_predictions.thesis: Falls to ₹160–170 by May 28 on crude-driven GRM compression
open_predictions.note: THESIS REVIVING: Brent back at $110.05 (above $110 threshold). Iran rejected ceasefire = war premium returning = crude elevated or higher. Govt diesel export tax adds direct refiner margin pressure. MRPL at ~₹175, above target (₹160-170) but narrowing. Tuesday escalation could spike crude to $115+ and accelerate MRPL decline.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Did Brent stay above $110 through Apr 7? Did Trump act on Tuesday deadline? If Brent >$115 = P002 thesis accelerating. Check MRPL EOD price.

open_predictions.thesis: Nifty tests 22,000–22,200 by May 10 on FII selling + Iran risk
open_predictions.note: THESIS STRONGLY REVIVING: Apr 6 rally was false dawn. Iran rejected ceasefire. FII sold ₹8,167 Cr Apr 6 (PAT001 breached). Nifty at 22,838 = 638 pts above target but path re-opened. PAT001 1.5x applied = effective downside extends to 21,500-21,800. Tuesday Trump deadline = possible gap-down to 22,200-22,500 zone. P003 may resolve before May 10.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: What happened Tuesday 8pm ET? Gap-down on strikes? Or Iran blinked? Did Nifty break 22,500? Was FII Apr 7 data also >₹8,000 Cr (PAT001 confirmation)?

open_predictions.thesis: Closes above ₹430 by May 28 — domestic demand insulation
open_predictions.note: Thesis tracking strongly. ₹461 vs ₹430 target with 51 days left. Market weakness on Apr 7 but Coal India insulated. Only risk: correlated crash if Nifty breaks 22,000 on Tuesday escalation. Watch IREDA Apr 16 earnings for PSU sector rotation impact.
open_predictions.check_on_next_run: Coal India EOD price Apr 7. Did broader market selloff drag Coal India? If >₹450 = thesis very safe. If <₹430 = flag for urgent review.

pending_outcomes_to_score.score_condition: Did Nifty close at or below 22,200 at any point before April 21?
Is COAL INDIA above ₹430 at close on May 28?

pattern_alerts.description: FII selling + global risk-off = actual price move exceeds model estimate by 1.5–2x
pattern_alerts.status: WATCHING — needs 1 more occurrence to confirm

framework_updates_pending.name: FII Panic Threshold
framework_updates_pending.description: Track FII daily sell quantum vs 30-day average. >2x average = panic mode = double all downside estimates
framework_updates_pending.evidence: P007 wrong because FII sold ₹9,931 Cr vs avg ₹4,000 Cr — panic threshold not modeled

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: CRITICAL: What happened at/after Trump's Tuesday 8pm ET deadline? Did US strike Iran? Did Iran blink?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: This is the single biggest binary event. Gap-down open on Wed Apr 8 = strikes happened. Gap-up = Iran accepted. This determines regime for next 2-4 weeks.
priority_checks_for_next_run.where_to_check: Search 'Trump Iran strikes April 8 2026', 'Hormuz Strait reopened', 'Iran ceasefire April 8'

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: Nifty EOD close on April 7 — did it hold 22,500? Did it close above or below the Apr 6 close of 22,968?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: P003 thesis needs Nifty to decline. If Apr 7 close <22,500 = P003 accelerating. If >22,700 = war premium not fully back.

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: FII flow for April 7 — continued selling or reversal?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: If FII sold >₹8,000 Cr again on Apr 7 = PAT001 pattern has 2 consecutive occurrences = promote to confirmed framework. If FII bought = de-escalation trades coming back.

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: Brent crude EOD — is it holding $110 or spiking toward $115+ on Tuesday deadline fears?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: P002 (MRPL) thesis fully alive if Brent stays >$110. Tuesday deadline creates spike risk. Monitor direction.

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: Coal India EOD price — did broad market selloff drag it below ₹450?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: P005 very safe at ₹461 but violent selloff days can drag even insulated stocks. Confirm thesis still intact.

priority_checks_for_next_run.check: Did user execute A001 (SWIGGY sell) or A002 (INDIGO partial sell) today?
priority_checks_for_next_run.why: A002 INDIGO is CRITICAL — user should have trimmed 20-30% before Tuesday deadline. Check execution.
priority_checks_for_next_run.where_to_check: User confirmation or ICICI/Groww portfolio check

questions_to_answer_next_run: CRITICAL: Did Trump strike Iran on Tuesday 8pm ET? What is Hormuz status on Apr 8 morning?
Did Nifty close above or below 22,500 on Apr 7? Confirm P003 direction.
What was FII flow for Apr 7? If >₹8,000 Cr sell again = PAT001 promoted to confirmed framework factor.
Did user execute A001 (SWIGGY) and A002 (INDIGO partial sell) today?
Is Brent above or below $110 at Apr 8 open? P002 direction depends on this.
Coal India EOD Apr 7 — confirm thesis still safely above ₹430.
Any new corporate actions/results announcements for portfolio holdings (IREDA etc.)?
prompt_for_morning_brief:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Today is {{DATE}}. Run the morning intelligence briefing.

CONTEXT FROM LAST RUN (Apr 7 Morning):
- **REGIME: WAR_PREMIUM_RESURGING** — Apr 6 de-escalation was FALSE DAWN. Iran REJECTED ceasefire. Trump Tuesday 8pm ET Hormuz deadline LIVE.
- Last Nifty: 22,838 (Apr 7 open, down from 22,968). Brent: $110.05 (back above $110 threshold).
- FII Apr 6: ₹-8,167 Cr (PAT001 threshold breached >₹8,000 Cr). DII Apr 6: +₹8,089 Cr.
- **PREDICTION STATUS:**
  - P002 (MRPL bearish): Conf **2⭐ RECOVERING** — Brent back at $110, war premium returning, diesel export tax adds margin pressure
  - P003 (NIFTY bearish): Conf **3⭐ STRONGLY REVIVING** — false dawn confirmed, FII panic-selling, war premium back
  - P005 (Coal India bullish): Conf **5⭐ STRONG** — insulated, ₹461 vs ₹430 target

ACTIONS FOR THIS RUN:
1. **PRIORITY 1 (CRITICAL):** What happened at Trump's Tuesday 8pm ET deadline? US strikes on Iran? Hormuz status? This single event changes everything for Apr 8.
   Search: 'Trump Iran strikes April 8 2026', 'Hormuz reopened April 8', 'Iran ceasefire April 8'
2. **PRIORITY 2:** Nifty Apr 7 EOD close and Apr 8 open — confirm P003 direction.
3. **PRIORITY 3:** FII flow for Apr 7 — if >₹8,000 Cr second day = PAT001 PROMOTED to confirmed framework factor (update signal-framework.json)
4. **PRIORITY 4:** Check INDIGO — did user execute A002 partial sell? What is current INDIGO price?
5. Log all observations for P002, P003, P005
6. Update actions.json urgency based on Trump deadline outcome
7. Write morning briefing to daily-briefings/{{DATE}}-morning.md

ACCURACY LEARNINGS TO APPLY:
- PAT001 active: if FII selling >₹8,000 Cr/day, multiply ALL downside estimates by 1.5x
- **LEARNING from Apr 6-7:** 'Deadline passed without strikes' ≠ 'de-escalation confirmed'. Require actual signed agreement + Hormuz reopening for regime change.
- **NEW FRAMEWORK GAP:** Add 'Geopolitical Narrative Verification' check — before marking regime change, require 2 of: (1) ceasefire signed, (2) Hormuz reopened, (3) Brent <$100 for 3 days
- Thesis Invalidation Protocol: P002 invalidated ONLY if Brent <$95 for 5+ days. P003 invalidated ONLY if Nifty closes >23,500 for 3 days AND FII inflow >₹5,000 Cr/day.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
Briefing: (1) Trump deadline outcome + Hormuz status, (2) Nifty open + regime assessment, (3) FII data + PAT001 status, (4) P002/P003/P005 updates, (5) top 3 actions with urgency, (6) watch levels for the session
prompt_for_eod_wrap:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the end-of-day wrap for {{DATE}}.

CONTEXT FROM MORNING BRIEF:
- {{morning_brief_summary}}
- Open actions: {{open_actions_count}} with {{high_urgency_count}} HIGH urgency

ACTIONS FOR THIS RUN:
1. Search: 'Nifty close {{DATE}}', 'India market close today', 'top gainers losers NSE {{DATE}}'
2. Score any predictions that resolved today
3. For any WRONG predictions: run RCA (root_cause, missing_factor, signal_missed, proposed_factor)
4. Update predictions-history.json with daily log entries
5. Recalculate accuracy-meta.json with new scores
6. Check if any patterns (like PAT001) now have 2+ occurrences → promote to framework
7. Generate market-forecasts.json for next session
8. Write EOD brief to daily-briefings/{{DATE}}-eod.md
9. CRITICAL: Update next-run-context.json — especially update prompt_for_morning_brief with learnings from today

ACCURACY FEEDBACK LOOP:
- If a prediction was WRONG: add to rca_log, check if pattern repeating, if yes promote to framework factor
- If framework factor promoted: update signal-framework.json + update all future prompts to use new factor
- Accuracy target: >70% in rolling 10. If below: tighten confidence thresholds, require more signal convergence
prompt_for_weekly_intelligence:
You are an expert market intelligence agent. Run the weekly intelligence review for week ending {{DATE}}.

SCOPE:
1. Score all predictions that matured this week
2. Full L2 RCA on all WRONG predictions from the week
3. L3 trend analysis: is accuracy improving or degrading? Why?
4. Factor performance: which signals were most/least predictive this week?
5. Framework evolution: any factors to promote, modify, or retire?
6. Portfolio review: any holdings to re-evaluate based on thesis changes?
7. Macro outlook: next 4 weeks — key events, risks, opportunities
8. Generate 5 new predictions for next week with full signal backing
9. Write weekly intelligence report to daily-briefings/weekly-{{DATE}}.md
10. CRITICAL: Update next-run-context.json with evolved framework, new patterns, updated prompts

EVOLUTION MECHANISM:
- Check accuracy_meta.json for factor_performance
- Any factor with <40% accuracy in last 10 uses: flag for review
- Any factor with >80% accuracy: increase weight in future predictions
- Update prompt templates to reflect evolved framework

scheduled_task_definitions.name: eod_wrap
scheduled_task_definitions.output: daily-briefings/YYYY-MM-DD-eod.md + predictions-history.json update + accuracy-meta.json update + market-forecasts.json + next-run-context.json update

scheduled_task_definitions.name: weekly_intelligence
scheduled_task_definitions.output: daily-briefings/weekly-YYYY-MM-DD.md + signal-framework.json update + next-run-context.json major update
